abstract_en: Google DeepMind introduces Gemini Robotics and Gemini Robotics-ER as embodied reasoning and robot-control models for physical agents.
abstract_zh: Google DeepMind 推出 Gemini Robotics 与 Gemini Robotics-ER，作为面向物理智能体的具身推理与机器人控制模型。
editorial_summary_zh: 把具身推理、长程任务分解和机器人执行统一到 Gemini 体系里。
editorial_summary_en: Brings embodied reasoning, planning, and robot execution into the Gemini stack.
why_it_matters: It shows major labs treating world understanding and planning as central ingredients for physical agents, not separate add-ons.
